0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Installation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is installed as a Python package and registered with your Hermes agent. This page walks through every step — from prerequisites to verification."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Before installing Mnemosyne, make sure you have:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}]," — check with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python --version"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes Agent"}]," already installed and initialized at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/hermes-agent/"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"pip"}]," or ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"uv"}]," package manager available in your shell"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Don't have Hermes yet?"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["If you haven't set up Hermes Agent, do that first. Mnemosyne is a plugin that runs ",["$","em",null,{"children":"inside"}]," the Hermes ecosystem — it won't work as a standalone tool without it."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Three commands. That's all it takes."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 1 — Activate the Hermes virtual environment:"}]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"source ~/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/activate","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Required step"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["You ",["$","em",null,{"children":"must"}]," activate the venv before running pip. Without it, the package installs into the wrong Python environment and Hermes won't find it."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 2 — Install the package:"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Use the command that matches how your virtual environment was created:"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"# If your venv was created with python -m venv or virtualenv\npip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n\n# If your venv was created with uv venv (pip is not included)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:20:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"uv venv does not include pip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["If you created the Hermes venv with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv venv"}],", running ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," will fail with \"command not found.\" This is by design — uv replaces pip with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip"}],". Always use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install"}]," in uv-created environments."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12","y1":"8","y2":"12","key":"1pkeuh"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12.01","y1":"16","y2":"16","key":"4dfq90"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],"$L5"]}]}],"\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24"],["$L25"],"$L26"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"5CS-Z2GOu_j-gS8atNSXn"}
5:["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"fastembed is required for semantic memory"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," extra installs ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"fastembed"}],", which powers semantic vector search. Without it, Mnemosyne falls back to primitive FTS5 keyword search only. You will ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"not"}]," get:"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Semantic similarity search"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Context-aware retrieval"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Meaning-based memory matching"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Hybrid search (vector + text combined)"}],"\n"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Always install with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," unless you are explicitly running a keyword-only deployment."]}]]}]]}]
6:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Step 3 — Register with Hermes:"}]}]
7:["$","$L4",null,{"code":"python -m mnemosyne.install","language":"bash"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":["This creates the plugin symlink and updates ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}]," so Hermes knows about Mnemosyne."]}]
9:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install Options"}]
a:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"pip vs uv"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Both work. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv"}]," is faster, but only if you use the matching install command:"]}]
c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Venv created with"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Install command"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m venv"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"virtualenv"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"uv venv"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]"}]}]]}]]}]]}]
d:["$","$L4",null,{"code":"# Standard pip (venv created with python -m venv)\npip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n\n# uv (venv created with uv venv)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]","language":"bash"}]
e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Extras"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne ships optional dependency groups you can install as needed:"}]
10:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Extra"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Command"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it adds"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Core (not recommended)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Base package with FTS5 keyword search only"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"+ fastembed for semantic vector search"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"LLM"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[llm]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"+ ctransformers for local LLM consolidation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Everything"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All optional dependencies"}]]}]]}]]}]
11:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:30:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-circle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[false,["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","strong",null,{"children":["core install without ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," is strongly discouraged"]}]," for production use. You get primitive keyword matching only. Install with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," to unlock semantic search, hybrid retrieval, and context-aware memory matching."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
12:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the stats command through Hermes to confirm everything is wired up:"}]
14:["$","$L4",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne stats","language":"bash"}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":["You should see a summary of memory tiers and database status. If the command is not found, the registration step may have failed — re-run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.install"}],"."]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"You can also verify the Python package directly:"}]
17:["$","$L4",null,{"code":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"","language":"bash"}]
18:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Useful Hermes Commands"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":"Once installed, these are the Mnemosyne commands available through Hermes:"}]
1a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Command"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne stats"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Show memory statistics"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne version"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Show installed version"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne inspect [query]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Search memories interactively"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne sleep"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run consolidation (sleep cycle)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne export --output <path>"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Export memories to JSON"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes mnemosyne import --input <path>"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Import memories from JSON"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes memory setup"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Interactive provider picker (curses UI)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes memory status"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Show current memory provider config"}]]}]]}]]}]
1b:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:30:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-circle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Common mistake"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Do ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"not"}]," use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes plugin install mnemosyne"}]," — that command doesn't exist. The correct Hermes plugin commands are ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes plugins install <git-url>"}]," (note the plural ",["$","em",null,{"children":"plugins"}],"), which expects a Git repository URL. Mnemosyne is installed via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip"}]," and registered with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"python -m mnemosyne.install"}],", not through the plugin manager."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
1c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Optional: sqlite-vec for Vector Performance"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"fastembed"}]," (installed via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}],") to generate semantic vectors and stores them directly in SQLite. This works out of the box with no extra dependencies."]}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":["If you have ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"very large datasets"}]," (100K+ memories) and want maximum vector query performance, you can optionally install ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],":"]}]
1f:["$","$L4",null,{"code":"pip install sqlite-vec","language":"bash"}]
20:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:10:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"sqlite-vec is an optimization, not a requirement"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Without sqlite-vec:"}]," Semantic search still works via fastembed + in-memory vector comparison. Slightly slower on huge datasets."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"With sqlite-vec:"}]," Vector storage and similarity search happen inside SQLite with native C performance. Faster on large datasets."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Either way:"}]," You need ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," installed for semantic search to work at all. sqlite-vec alone does nothing."]}],"\n"]}]}]]}]]}]}]
21:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Development Install (from Source)"}]
22:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're contributing or want to run the latest unreleased changes:"}]
23:["$","$L4",null,{"code":"# Activate the Hermes venv first\nsource ~/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/activate\n\n# Clone the repo\ngit clone https://github.com/axdsan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\n\n# Install in editable mode with dev dependencies\npip install -e \".[dev]\"\n\n# Register with Hermes\npython -m mnemosyne.install","language":"bash"}]
24:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":"$0:rsc:props:children:0:10:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Editable mode"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"-e"}]," flag installs in \"editable\" mode — changes to the source code take effect immediately without re-installing. Perfect for development and debugging."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
25:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/12r39sjxj5pr8.js","async":true}]
26:["$","$L27",null,{"children":["$","$28",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@29"}]}]
